content.name: Extraction
intro: Given a function f and a linked list (V a (V b (V c ...))), return f b c.
cases: V=BC(CI); phi f (V a (V b (V c (V d (KI)))))

content.name: Sort a linked list
intro: Given a predicate in_order and a linked list,
return a list such that for every two consecutive elements in_order returns true.
You can use cons/V and nil to construct a linked list.
